============================================================
llms-full.txt - DevUI Pencil Design System
============================================================

# 1. METADATA | 元数据
PROJECT_NAME: DevUI Design System
SOURCE_FORMAT: Pencil .pen (Design-as-Code)
SYNC_TARGET: Angular (ng-devui) / Vue (vue-devui) / React
LAYOUT_ENGINE: Pencil Auto Layout (Flex-compatible)
PEN_FILE: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
TOTAL_REUSABLE_COMPONENTS: 706
COMPONENT_GROUPS: 60+
DESIGN_SPEC_URL: https://devui.design/design-cn/start
GITHUB_REPO: https://github.com/DevCloudFE/ng-devui
VARIANT_NAMING_CONVENTION: "组件类型/变体Key=Value" (e.g., 按钮-主要/尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=default)

============================================================
# 2. GLOBAL DESIGN TOKENS | 全局设计令牌
============================================================

## 2.1 Color Palette | 色板

### 2.1.1 Brand Colors | 品牌色
TOKEN: devui-brand          | VALUE: #5e7ce0  | USAGE: 主要按钮、品牌色、选中态
TOKEN: devui-brand-foil     | VALUE: #f2f5fc  | USAGE: 品牌色辅助底色（hover/选中底色）
TOKEN: devui-brand-hover    | VALUE: #7693f5  | USAGE: 品牌色高亮（按钮hover）
TOKEN: devui-brand-active   | VALUE: #526ecc  | USAGE: 品牌色激活（按钮active）

### 2.1.2 Text Colors | 文字色
TOKEN: devui-text           | VALUE: #252b3a  | USAGE: 主要文字、正文文本
TOKEN: devui-text-weak      | VALUE: #575d6c  | USAGE: 弱化正文（表头、手风琴子项）
TOKEN: devui-aide-text      | VALUE: #8a8e99  | USAGE: 次要文字、辅助文本（面包屑、占位符）
TOKEN: devui-light-text     | VALUE: #ffffff  | USAGE: 深色背景上的文字
TOKEN: devui-link           | VALUE: #5e7ce0  | USAGE: 链接文字色

### 2.1.3 Background Colors | 背景色
TOKEN: devui-base-bg        | VALUE: #ffffff  | USAGE: 基础白色背景
TOKEN: devui-global-bg      | VALUE: #f5f5f5  | USAGE: 全局灰底背景
TOKEN: devui-area           | VALUE: #f3f3f3  | USAGE: 可折叠区块背景
TOKEN: devui-disabled-bg    | VALUE: #f3f3f3  | USAGE: 禁用背景
TOKEN: devui-list-hover-bg  | VALUE: #f2f2f3  | USAGE: 列表项悬浮背景
TOKEN: devui-list-active-bg | VALUE: #cedefd  | USAGE: 列表项选中背景

### 2.1.4 Border Colors | 边框色
TOKEN: devui-line           | VALUE: #adb0b8  | USAGE: 边框分割线（输入框、按钮次要）
TOKEN: devui-dividing-line  | VALUE: #dfe1e6  | USAGE: 内容分割线（侧边栏边框、表格分割线）
TOKEN: devui-form-active    | VALUE: #5e7ce0  | USAGE: 表单激活边框（focus状态）
TOKEN: devui-form-hover     | VALUE: #575d6c  | USAGE: 表单控件hover边框

### 2.1.5 Status Colors | 状态色
TOKEN: devui-success        | VALUE: #50d4ab  | USAGE: 成功（绿色标签、输入框成功态）
TOKEN: devui-danger         | VALUE: #f66f6a  | USAGE: 失败/错误
TOKEN: devui-warning        | VALUE: #fac532  | USAGE: 警告
TOKEN: devui-info           | VALUE: #5e7ce0  | USAGE: 信息/通知

### 2.1.6 Tag-Specific Colors | 标签专用色
TOKEN: tag-green-fill       | VALUE: #50d4ab  | USAGE: 绿色实心标签背景
TOKEN: tag-green-light-fill | VALUE: #edfff9  | USAGE: 绿色辅助标签背景
TOKEN: tag-green-text       | VALUE: #50d4ab  | USAGE: 绿色辅助/线性标签文字
TOKEN: tag-orange-fill      | VALUE: #f2a238  | USAGE: 橙色实心标签
TOKEN: tag-red-fill         | VALUE: #f66f6a  | USAGE: 红色标签
TOKEN: tag-grey-fill        | VALUE: #f5f5f5  | USAGE: 灰色辅助标签
TOKEN: tag-regular-fill     | VALUE: #f2f5fc  | USAGE: 常规标签背景

### 2.1.7 DevUI Official Color Palette (from ng-devui source)
BLUE:    #e6eeff → #cedefd → #9dbdfc → #6b9bfa → #3979f9 → #0a59f7 → #0950de → #0039bd → #002794 → #00196b → #000f42
GREEN:   #e7fbf2 → #bcf2db → #8fe5c2 → #63d5a8 → #36c18d → #09aa71 → #058358 → #036142 → #02422e
RED:     #fee7e8 → #fabdc1 → #f59297 → #ee696f → #e7434a → #e02128 → #c7000b → #850f12 → #59080a
YELLOW:  #fefce0 → #fdf8b8 → #fef08a → #fde55c → #fcd72e → #fcc800 → #d19f00 → #9e7400 → #614500
ORANGE:  #fef5e8 → #fde2bd → #fcce92 → #f9b766 → #f69e39 → #f4840c → #c76207 → #954304 → #642802
SLATE:   #fafafa → #f5f5f5 → #f0f0f0 → #e6e6e6 → #dbdbdb → #c2c2c2 → #808080 → #595959 → #333333 → #191919 → #000000
GRAY:    #f3f3f3 → #dfdfdf → #c9c9c9 → #aeaeae → #939393 → #777777 → #595959 → #393939 → #2a2a2a → #191919 → #000000

## 2.2 Typography | 排版

### Font Family
PRIMARY: "Noto Sans SC" (中文优先)
SECONDARY: "HarmonyOS Sans SC" (华为鸿蒙字体)
LATIN: "Roboto"
SYSTEM_FALLBACK: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif

### Font Scale
LEVEL: body-sm     | SIZE: 12px | WEIGHT: normal | LINE_HEIGHT: 1.67 (20px) | USAGE: 正文、卡片副标题、标签、描述文本
LEVEL: body        | SIZE: 14px | WEIGHT: normal | LINE_HEIGHT: 1.57 (22px) | USAGE: 正文、卡片标题、按钮文本、菜单项
LEVEL: body-strong | SIZE: 14px | WEIGHT: 500    | LINE_HEIGHT: 1.57 (22px) | USAGE: 筛选选中态、强调文本
LEVEL: body-bold   | SIZE: 14px | WEIGHT: 700    | LINE_HEIGHT: 1.57 (22px) | USAGE: 侧边菜单active、标题强调
LEVEL: subtitle    | SIZE: 15px | WEIGHT: normal | LINE_HEIGHT: auto        | USAGE: 侧边栏分组标题
LEVEL: title       | SIZE: 16px | WEIGHT: 500    | LINE_HEIGHT: auto        | USAGE: 页面标题
LEVEL: heading     | SIZE: 18px | WEIGHT: 700    | LINE_HEIGHT: auto        | USAGE: 弹窗标题、卡片大标题

### ng-devui Font Tokens (Official)
--devui-font-size: 12px                  // 正文、卡片副标题
--devui-font-size-card-title: 14px       // 卡片标题
--devui-font-size-page-title: 16px       // 页面标题
--devui-font-size-modal-title: 18px      // 弹窗标题
--devui-font-size-price: 20px            // 价格
--devui-font-size-data-overview: 24px    // 数据总览
--devui-font-size-h1-title: 28px
--devui-font-size-h2-title: 24px
--devui-font-size-h3-title: 20px
--devui-font-size-h4-title: 18px
--devui-font-size-h5-title: 16px
--devui-font-size-sm: 12px              // Size=sm 组件字号
--devui-font-size-md: 12px              // Size=md 组件字号
--devui-font-size-lg: 14px              // Size=lg 组件字号
--devui-font-title-weight: bold
--devui-font-content-weight: normal
--devui-line-height-base: 1.5

## 2.3 Spacing System | 间距系统

### Component Padding (top, right, bottom, left)
BUTTON_PRIMARY_MD: [5px, 16px, 5px, 16px]
BUTTON_PRIMARY_SM: [4px, 16px, 4px, 16px]
BUTTON_SECONDARY_MD: [4px, 16px, 4px, 16px]
BUTTON_ICON_TEXT: [4px, 8px, 4px, 8px]
TAG_MD: [0, 8px, 0, 8px]
SEARCH_BOX: [5px, 8px, 5px, 8px]
CARD: [20px, 24px, 20px, 24px]
SIDEBAR: [12px, 0, 12px, 8px]
SIDEBAR_MENU: [9px, 20px, 9px, 12px]
TOP_NAV: [0, 8px]
FORM_ITEM: [12px, 5px, 12px, 5px]

### Component Gap
BUTTON_ICON_GAP: 4px
TAG_INNER_GAP: 4px
FORM_GROUP_GAP: 8px
CARD_CONTENT_GAP: 16px
CARD_SECTION_GAP: 20px
PAGE_SECTION_GAP: 10px
PAGINATION_GAP: 9px
SIDEBAR_MENU_GAP: 7px

## 2.4 Corner Radius | 圆角

TOKEN: radius-xs    | VALUE: 2px   | USAGE: 复选框、侧边栏
TOKEN: radius-sm    | VALUE: 4px   | USAGE: 按钮、标签、输入框、页码、二级菜单
TOKEN: radius-md    | VALUE: 6px   | USAGE: 搜索框
TOKEN: radius-lg    | VALUE: 8px   | USAGE: 卡片
TOKEN: radius-pill  | VALUE: 16px  | USAGE: 圆角标签（特殊）
TOKEN: radius-round | VALUE: 999px | USAGE: 头像、圆形按钮

## 2.5 Shadows | 阴影

TOKEN: shadow-card | VALUE: 0 1px 5.25px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)   | USAGE: 卡片、顶部导航
TOKEN: shadow-overlay | VALUE: 0 4px 10.5px rgba(0,0,0,0.16) | USAGE: 下拉面板、弹出层
TOKEN: shadow-sidebar | VALUE: 1px 0 7px rgba(25,25,25,0.06)  | USAGE: 侧边栏

## 2.6 Stroke | 描边

TOKEN: stroke-default   | THICKNESS: 1px     | COLOR: #adb0b8 | USAGE: 输入框、次要按钮边框
TOKEN: stroke-divider   | THICKNESS: 1px     | COLOR: #dfe1e6 | USAGE: 分割线、侧边栏边框
TOKEN: stroke-active    | THICKNESS: 2px     | COLOR: #5e7ce0 | USAGE: 侧边菜单active左侧指示条
TOKEN: stroke-focus     | THICKNESS: 1px     | COLOR: #5e7ce0 | USAGE: 输入框focus状态
TOKEN: stroke-danger    | THICKNESS: 1px     | COLOR: #f66f6a | USAGE: 输入框danger状态
TOKEN: stroke-hover     | THICKNESS: 1px     | COLOR: #575d6c | USAGE: 输入框hover状态

============================================================
# 3. COMPONENT SPECIFICATIONS | 组件规范
============================================================

---
COMPONENT: 按钮-主要 (Primary Button)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: RoYUx (尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=default)
NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [按钮-主要] (reusable=true)
      ├── frame [新增（add）] 16×16 icon container
      │   └── path [形状结合] icon shape
      ├── text [主要按钮] content label
      └── frame [下拉（chevron-down）] 16×16 optional dropdown icon
          └── path [形状结合] chevron shape
PROPERTIES: {
  "type": "frame",
  "layout": "horizontal (flex-direction: row)",
  "alignItems": "center",
  "justifyContent": "center",
  "cornerRadius": [4,4,4,4],
  "fill": "#5e7ce0",
  "gap": 4,
  "clip": true,
  "stroke": { "align": "inside", "thickness": 1 }
}
SIZE_VARIANTS: {
  "sm": { "padding": [4,16,4,16], "fontSize": 14 },
  "md": { "padding": [5,16,5,16], "fontSize": 14 },
  "lg": { "padding": [8,16,8,16], "fontSize": 14 }
}
STATUS_VARIANTS: {
  "default":  { "fill": "#5e7ce0", "textColor": "#ffffff" },
  "hover":    { "fill": "#7693f5", "textColor": "#ffffff" },
  "active":   { "fill": "#526ecc", "textColor": "#ffffff" },
  "disabled": { "fill": "#beccfa", "textColor": "#ffffff" }
}
CHILDREN_CONFIG: {
  "icon_left": { "type": "frame", "size": 16, "fill": "#ffffff (icon path)" },
  "label": { "type": "text", "fontFamily": "Noto Sans SC", "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "fill": "#ffffff" },
  "icon_right": { "type": "frame", "size": 16, "optional": true, "fill": "#ffffff (chevron)" }
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-button variant="primary" size="md|sm|lg">
  - Icon: left/right slots or `icon` prop
  - Dropdown chevron: indicates combo/split button usage
---

---
COMPONENT: 按钮-次要 (Secondary Button)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: qTc8e (尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=default)
NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [按钮-次要] (reusable=true)
      ├── frame [新增（add）] 16×16 icon container
      │   └── path [形状结合] icon shape
      └── text [次要按钮] content label
PROPERTIES: {
  "type": "frame",
  "layout": "horizontal",
  "alignItems": "center",
  "cornerRadius": [4,4,4,4],
  "fill": "#ffffff",
  "gap": 4,
  "stroke": { "align": "inside", "fill": "#adb0b8", "thickness": 1 }
}
SIZE_VARIANTS: {
  "sm": { "padding": [4,16,4,16] },
  "md": { "padding": [4,16,4,16] },
  "lg": { "padding": [5,16,5,16] }
}
STATUS_VARIANTS: {
  "default":  { "fill": "#ffffff", "stroke": "#adb0b8", "textColor": "#252b3a" },
  "hover":    { "fill": "#ffffff", "stroke": "#5e7ce0", "textColor": "#5e7ce0" },
  "active":   { "fill": "#ffffff", "stroke": "#526ecc", "textColor": "#526ecc" },
  "disabled": { "fill": "#ffffff", "stroke": "#dfe1e6", "textColor": "#babbc0" }
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-button variant="common" size="md|sm|lg">
---

---
COMPONENT: 按钮-图标文本按钮 (Icon Text Button)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: hOrvp (尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=default)
NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [按钮-图标文本按钮] (reusable=true)
      ├── frame [新增（add）] 16×16
      ├── text [图标文本按钮] label
      └── frame [下拉（chevron-down）] 16×16
PROPERTIES: {
  "type": "frame",
  "layout": "horizontal",
  "alignItems": "center",
  "justifyContent": "center",
  "gap": 4,
  "padding": [4,8,4,8],
  "fill": "transparent",
  "stroke": { "align": "inside", "thickness": 1 }
}
STATUS_VARIANTS: {
  "default":  { "textColor": "#252b3a" },
  "hover":    { "textColor": "#5e7ce0" },
  "active":   { "textColor": "#526ecc" },
  "disabled": { "textColor": "#babbc0" }
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-button variant="text-dark">
  - No background, no border; text-only button with icon
---

---
COMPONENT: 按钮-可下拉次要组合按钮 (Dropdown Combo Button)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: XE86l (状态-status=default, icon or number=icon, 尺寸=md)
VARIANT_AXES: {
  "status": ["default", "right-hover", "right-active", "left-hover", "left-active", "disabled"],
  "icon or number": ["icon", "number"],
  "尺寸": ["md", "sm"]
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-button-group> with split dropdown
  - Left part: main action; Right part: dropdown trigger
  - "left-hover"/"right-hover" means hover on left/right side respectively
---

---
COMPONENT: 文本输入框 (TextInput)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: jmCZP (状态-status=noContent)
NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [文本输入框] (reusable=true)
      └── frame [Frame 38] (width: fill_container)
          ├── rectangle [Rectangle 15] border container
          └── text [请输入] placeholder text
PROPERTIES: {
  "type": "frame",
  "layout": "horizontal",
  "alignItems": "center",
  "width": 296,
  "gap": 10,
  "fill": { "enabled": false }
}
INNER_INPUT: {
  "cornerRadius": [4,4,4,4],
  "fill": "#ffffff",
  "stroke": { "fill": "#adb0b8", "thickness": 1 },
  "height": 32,
  "text": { "fontFamily": "Noto Sans SC", "fontSize": 14, "padding": [5,12] }
}
STATUS_VARIANTS: {
  "noContent":          { "stroke": "#adb0b8", "text": "#8a8e99 (placeholder)" },
  "hasContent":         { "stroke": "#c9c9c9", "text": "#252b3a" },
  "hover":              { "stroke": "#575d6c" },
  "focus":              { "stroke": "#5e7ce0" },
  "input":              { "stroke": "#5e7ce0", "text": "#252b3a" },
  "danger":             { "stroke": "#f66f6a" },
  "Success":            { "stroke": "#50d4ab" },
  "disabled":           { "fill": "#f5f5f5", "stroke": "#dfe1e6", "text": "#babbc0" },
  "disabled-hasContent":{ "fill": "#f5f5f5", "stroke": "#dfe1e6", "text": "#babbc0" }
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-input> or <input dTextInput>
  - Width stretches with parent (fill_container)
---

---
COMPONENT: 数字输入框 (NumberInput)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: 1ggPm (状态-status=default)
NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [数字输入框] (reusable=true, layout=none)
      ├── rectangle [Rectangle 20] background/border
      ├── frame [减 1] 16×16 decrease icon
      ├── rectangle [divider left] 1×16
      ├── frame [Frame 49] value display
      │   └── text [2] number value
      ├── rectangle [divider right] 1×16
      └── frame [新增（add）] 16×16 increase icon
PROPERTIES: {
  "type": "frame",
  "layout": "none (absolute positioning)",
  "cornerRadius": [4,4,4,4],
  "fill": "#ffffff",
  "stroke": { "fill": "#575d6c", "thickness": 1 },
  "width": 99,
  "height": 32
}
STATUS_VARIANTS: {
  "default":       { "stroke": "#575d6c" },
  "hover":         { "stroke": "#5e7ce0" },
  "left-hover":    { "left button bg": "#f2f5fc" },
  "right-hover":   { "right button bg": "#f2f5fc" },
  "left-active":   { "left button bg": "#5e7ce0", "icon": "#ffffff" },
  "right-active":  { "right button bg": "#5e7ce0", "icon": "#ffffff" },
  "disabled":      { "fill": "#f5f5f5", "text": "#babbc0" }
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-input-number>
  - Dividers between buttons and input area
---

---
COMPONENT: 表单标题 (FormLabel)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: byJ1L (required=false, helpTips=false)
VARIANT_AXES: {
  "必选图标-required": [true, false],
  "提示图标-helpTips": [true, false]
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <label> with optional required asterisk (*) and help tooltip icon
---

---
COMPONENT: 表单项-文本输入框 (FormItem - TextInput)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: Laiht
VARIANT_AXES: {
  "状态-status": ["noContent", "hasContent", "hover", "focus", "input", "danger", "Success", "disabled", "disabled-hasContent"],
  "必选图标-required": [true, false],
  "提示图标-helpTips": [true, false],
  "是否展示辅助文本-showExtraInfo": [true, false],
  "表单项名称-label": [true, false]
}
TOTAL_VARIANTS: 82
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-form-item> wrapping <d-input>
  - Combines label + input + helper text in vertical layout
---

---
COMPONENT: 复选框 (Checkbox)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: bzYOF (noChecked, default)
NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [复选框] (reusable=true, 16×16)
      (internal checkbox visual)
PROPERTIES: {
  "type": "frame",
  "layout": "none",
  "cornerRadius": [2,2,2,2],
  "fill": "#ffffff",
  "stroke": { "fill": "#adb0b8", "thickness": 1 },
  "width": 16,
  "height": 16,
  "clip": true
}
STATUS_VARIANTS: {
  "noChecked+default":  { "fill": "#ffffff", "stroke": "#adb0b8" },
  "noChecked+hover":    { "fill": "#ffffff", "stroke": "#5e7ce0" },
  "noChecked+disabled": { "fill": "#f5f5f5", "stroke": "#dfe1e6" },
  "checked+default":    { "fill": "#5e7ce0", "stroke": "#5e7ce0", "checkmark": "#ffffff" },
  "checked+hover":      { "fill": "#7693f5", "checkmark": "#ffffff" },
  "checked+disabled":   { "fill": "#beccfa", "checkmark": "#ffffff" },
  "halfChecked+default":{ "fill": "#5e7ce0", "dash": "#ffffff" },
  "halfChecked+hover":  { "fill": "#7693f5", "dash": "#ffffff" },
  "halfChecked+disabled":{"fill": "#beccfa", "dash": "#ffffff" }
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-checkbox>
  - halfChecked = indeterminate state
---

---
COMPONENT: 复选框文本组合 (Checkbox with Label)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: f0TO6
PROPERTIES: {
  "layout": "horizontal",
  "alignItems": "center",
  "gap": 8,
  "children": ["checkbox_icon", "text_label"]
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-checkbox label="文本">
---

---
COMPONENT: 搜索框-线框白底风格 (Search Input)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: X93Mt (iconPosition=left, Status=default-noContent)
NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [搜索框-线框白底风格] (reusable=true)
      └── frame [Frame 19] (width: fill_container)
          ├── frame [search-new] 16×16 search icon
          └── text [请输入搜索内容] placeholder
PROPERTIES: {
  "type": "frame",
  "layout": "vertical",
  "cornerRadius": [6,6,6,6],
  "fill": "#ffffff",
  "stroke": { "align": "center", "fill": "#adb0b8", "thickness": 1 },
  "padding": [5,8,5,8],
  "width": 296,
  "clip": true
}
VARIANT_AXES: {
  "搜索图标位置-iconPosition": ["left", "right"],
  "状态-Status": ["default-noContent", "disabled", "disabled-entered", "default-contentpresent", "hover", "activation-inputPending", "activation-Entered"]
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-search>
  - iconPosition controls search icon placement
---

---
COMPONENT: 标签 (Tag - Solid)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: PXlZz (Size=md, Color=green)
PROPERTIES: {
  "type": "frame",
  "layout": "horizontal",
  "alignItems": "center",
  "justifyContent": "center",
  "cornerRadius": [4,4,4,4],
  "padding": [0,8,0,8],
  "clip": true,
  "fontSize": 12,
  "fontWeight": "500"
}
COLOR_VARIANTS: {
  "green":  { "fill": "#50d4ab", "textColor": "#ffffff" },
  "orange": { "fill": "#f2a238", "textColor": "#ffffff" }
}
SIZE_VARIANTS: {
  "md": { "height": 20 },
  "lg": { "height": 24 }
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-tag color="green|orange">
---

---
COMPONENT: 辅助标签 (Tag - Light)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: wcoqv (Size=md, Color=green)

  "cornerRadius": [4,4,4,4],
  "padding": [0,8,0,8],
  "fontSize": 12,
  "fontWeight": "normal"
}
COLOR_VARIANTS: {
  "green": { "fill": "#edfff9", "textColor": "#50d4ab" },
  "grey":  { "fill": "#f5f5f5", "textColor": "#8a8e99" }
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-tag type="outline" color="green|grey">
---

  └── frame [常规标签] (reusable=true)
      ├── frame [setting] 16×16 optional left icon
      ├── text [标签] label text
      └── frame [close] 16×16 optional close icon

  "cornerRadius": [4,4,4,4],
  "fill": "#f2f5fc",
  "gap": 4,
  "padding": 8,
  "height": 20,
  "fontSize": 12,
  "textColor": "#252b3a"
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-tag> (default variant)
  - With optional left icon and closable icon
---

  "cornerRadius": [4,4,4,4],
  "fill": "transparent",
  "stroke": { "align": "center", "fill": "[color]", "thickness": 1 },
  "padding": [0,8,0,8]
}
COLOR_VARIANTS: {
  "green":  { "stroke": "#50d4ab", "textColor": "#50d4ab" },
  "orange": { "stroke": "#f2a238", "textColor": "#f2a238" },
  "red":    { "stroke": "#f66f6a", "textColor": "#f66f6a" }
}

NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: cluPJ (statuse=default, type=number)

  "type": "frame",
  "layout": "none",
  "cornerRadius": [4,4,4,4],
  "width": 28,
  "height": 28,
  "clip": true,
  "textAlign": "center",
  "fontSize": 14
}
STATUS_VARIANTS: {
  "default+number":  { "fill": "transparent", "textColor": "#8a8e99" },
  "hover+number":    { "fill": "#f2f5fc", "textColor": "#5e7ce0" },
  "active+number":   { "fill": "#f2f5fc", "textColor": "#5e7ce0" },
  "disabled+number": { "fill": "transparent", "textColor": "#babbc0" }
}

---
COMPONENT: 分页 Pagination (Pagination)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: i5IDo (跳转=false)
NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [分页 Pagination] (reusable=true)
      ├── frame [Frame 30] per-page selector group
      │   ├── frame [下拉选择框] page size dropdown
      │   └── text [条/页] suffix
      ├── text [总条数：8] total count
      ├── frame [Frame 31] prev button (chevron-left)
      ├── frame [.页码] × N page items
      ├── frame [Frame 32] next button (chevron-right)
      └── (optional) frame [jump-to] jump input (when 跳转=true)
PROPERTIES: {
  "layout": "horizontal",
  "alignItems": "center",
  "gap": 9
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-pagination [total]="8" [pageSize]="10" [canJumpPage]="false|true">
---

  - 复杂: multi-level filter with panel

COMPONENT: 基本卡片 (Basic Card)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: 7ipso (状态=默认)
NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [基本卡片] (reusable=true)
      ├── frame [Frame 81] content area
      │   ├── frame [.标题] title row (with optional icon)
      │   └── text [描述文本] description
      └── frame [Frame 80] footer
          ├── frame [Frame 79] meta info (e.g., user avatar, date)
          └── frame [.信息展示] stats (e.g., stars, forks)
PROPERTIES: {
  "type": "frame",
  "layout": "vertical",
  "cornerRadius": [8,8,8,8],
  "fill": "#ffffff",
  "gap": 16,
  "padding": [20,24,20,24],
  "width": 320,
  "effect": { "type": "shadow", "blur": 5.25, "color": "rgba(0,0,0,0.08)", "offset": {"x":0,"y":1} }
}
STATUS_VARIANTS: {
  "默认":         { "standard appearance" },
  "悬浮":         { "effect": "enhanced shadow" },
  "悬浮-标题变蓝": { "effect": "enhanced shadow", "titleColor": "#5e7ce0" }
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-card>
  - Contains header (title), body (description), footer (meta + actions)
---

  └── frame [顶部导航栏] (reusable=true, width=1920)
      ├── frame [Frame 205] left section
      │   ├── frame [菜单按钮] hamburger/menu icon
      │   ├── frame [Frame 201] logo area
      │   ├── frame [Frame 202] breadcrumb/context
      │   ├── frame [控制台] console link
      │   ├── frame [定位] location indicator
      │   └── frame [菜单组] main menu items
      └── frame [Frame 203] right section
          ├── frame [Frame 204] action icons
          └── frame [头像信息] user avatar (28×28 round)
PROPERTIES: {
  "layout": "horizontal",
  "justifyContent": "space_between",
  "alignItems": "center",
  "fill": "#ffffff",
  "padding": [0,8],
  "width": 1920,
  "gap": 843,
  "effect": { "type": "shadow", "blur": 5.25, "color": "rgba(0,0,0,0.08)", "offset": {"x":0,"y":1} }
}

  - Map to: <d-navbar> or custom header layout
  - Full-width (1920px), fixed top

---
COMPONENT: 侧边导航-手风琴 (Accordion Sidebar)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: kyl45
NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [侧边导航-手风琴/侧边栏] (reusable=true)
      └── frame [Frame 194] (layout=vertical)
          ├── frame [Frame 186] header (project selector + collapse)
          └── frame [Frame 192] menu list (一级菜单组)

  "layout": "horizontal",
  "justifyContent": "end",
  "fill": "#ffffff",
  "clip": true,
  "width": 288,
  "height": 904,
  "padding": [12,0,12,8]
}
CHILDREN_COMPONENTS:
  - .一级 (first-level menu item, 5 states)
  - .二级 (second-level menu item, 8 variants)
  - .一级菜单展开 (expandable group, 8 variants)
  - 一级菜单组 (menu group, 1-9 items)
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Map to: <d-accordion> within sidebar layout

PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen

NODE_HIERARCHY:
  └── frame [.二级菜单-展开] (reusable=true)
      └── frame [Frame 143] (layout=horizontal)
          ├── frame [codehub-card-mode] 16×16 icon
          └── text [二级菜单] label
PROPERTIES: {
  "layout": "vertical",
  "cornerRadius": [4,4,4,4],
  "gap": 10,
  "padding": [9,20,9,12],
  "width": 184
}

  "default": { "fill": "transparent", "textColor": "#000000", "fontWeight": "normal" },
  "hover":   { "fill": "#f2f5fc", "textColor": "#000000", "fontWeight": "normal" },
  "active":  { "fill": "#f2f5fc", "textColor": "#000000", "fontWeight": "700", "stroke": { "left": 2, "fill": "#5e7ce0" } }
}

---
COMPONENT: 工具链专用导航 (Toolchain Sidebar)
PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: BBmtw (展开=off)
PROPERTIES: {
  "layout": "vertical",
  "justifyContent": "space_between",
  "fill": "#ffffff",
  "cornerRadius": [2,2,2,2],
  "width": 48,
  "height": 620,
  "padding": [12,0],
  "stroke": { "fill": "#dfe1e6", "thickness": { "bottom": 1, "left": 1 } },
  "effect": { "type": "shadow", "blur": 7, "color": "rgba(25,25,25,0.06)", "offset": {"x":1,"y":0} }
}
VARIANT_AXES: { "展开": ["on", "off"] }
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - 展开=off: collapsed sidebar (48px wide, icon-only)
  - 展开=on: expanded sidebar with labels

PEN_PATH: designsystem/devUI/components/devUI.pen
NODE_ID_EXAMPLE: PQwRQ
VARIANT_AXES: {
  "是否展示辅助文本-showExtraInfo": [true, false],
  "组件类型": ["下拉选择", "输入框"],
  "按钮": [true, false]
}
TRANSLATION_RULES:
  - Composite form field: label + input/select + optional button + optional helper text
---

============================================================
# 4. TRANSFORMATION RULES | 转换规则
============================================================

## 4.1 Layout Rules | 布局规则
1. Frames with `layout: "horizontal"` → `display: flex; flex-direction: row`
2. Frames with `layout: "vertical"` → `display: flex; flex-direction: column`
3. Frames with `layout: "none"` → children use absolute positioning (x, y)
4. `alignItems: "center"` → `align-items: center`
5. `justifyContent: "center"` → `justify-content: center`
6. `justifyContent: "space_between"` → `justify-content: space-between`
7. `justifyContent: "end"` → `justify-content: flex-end`
8. `gap: N` → `gap: Npx`
9. `padding: [T, R, B, L]` → `padding: Tpx Rpx Bpx Lpx`
10. `padding: N` → `padding: Npx`
11. `width: "fill_container"` → `flex: 1` or `width: 100%`

## 4.2 Visual Property Rules | 视觉属性规则
1. `cornerRadius: [TL, TR, BR, BL]` → `border-radius: TLpx TRpx BRpx BLpx`
2. `fill: "#hex"` → `background-color: #hex`
3. `fill: { "enabled": false }` → `background: transparent`
4. `stroke: { "fill": "#hex", "thickness": 1 }` → `border: 1px solid #hex`
5. `stroke: { "thickness": { "left": 2 } }` → `border-left: 2px solid [color]`
6. `clip: true` → `overflow: hidden`
7. `effect: { "type": "shadow", ... }` → `box-shadow: [offset-x] [offset-y] [blur] [color]`

## 4.3 Text Property Rules | 文字属性规则
1. `fontFamily: "Noto Sans SC"` → `font-family: "Noto Sans SC", sans-serif`
2. `fontSize: 14` → `font-size: 14px`
3. `fontWeight: "normal"` → `font-weight: 400`
4. `fontWeight: "500"` → `font-weight: 500`
5. `fontWeight: "700"` → `font-weight: 700`
6. `lineHeight: 1.57` → `line-height: 1.57` (22px for 14px font)
7. `textAlign: "center"` → `text-align: center`
8. `textGrowth: "fixed-width"` → `width: [explicit value]; white-space: normal`
9. `textGrowth: "fixed-width-height"` → `width: [value]; height: [value]; overflow: hidden`
10. `content: "..."` → text inner content

## 4.4 Component Mapping Rules | 组件映射规则

| Pencil Component (组件) | ng-devui Component | CSS Pattern |
|:---|:---|:---|
| 按钮-主要 | `<d-button bsStyle="primary">` | Solid bg + white text |
| 按钮-次要 | `<d-button bsStyle="common">` | White bg + border |
| 按钮-图标文本按钮 | `<d-button bsStyle="text-dark">` | Transparent + icon |
| 文本输入框 | `<input dTextInput>` | Border input field |
| 数字输入框 | `<d-input-number>` | Input with +/- buttons |
| 复选框 | `<d-checkbox>` | 16×16 check box |
| 搜索框 | `<d-search>` | Search with icon |
| 下拉选择框 | `<d-select>` | Dropdown selector |
| 标签 | `<d-tag>` | Pill/badge label |
| 分页 | `<d-pagination>` | Page navigation |
| 面包屑 | `<d-breadcrumb>` | Path trail |
| 页签 Pills | `<d-tabs type="pills">` | Pill tabs |
| 页签 Tabs | `<d-tabs>` | Underline tabs |
| 页签 Wrapped | `<d-tabs type="wrapped">` | Wrapped tabs |
| 筛选 | `<d-filter>` or custom | Filter dropdown |
| 表格 | `<d-data-table>` | Data table |
| 卡片 | `<d-card>` | Content card |
| 顶部导航栏 | `<d-navbar>` or custom | Top nav bar |
| 侧边导航-手风琴 | `<d-accordion>` | Collapsible sidebar |
| 工具链专用导航 | Custom sidebar | Icon rail sidebar |
| 表单项 | `<d-form-item>` | Label + control group |

## 4.5 Reusable Component Rules | 可复用组件规则
1. `reusable: true` → treat as component definition (not raw div)
2. `enabled: false` on children → conditional rendering (v-if / *ngIf)
3. Variant naming "Key=Value" → component props/inputs
4. 以"."开头的组件名 → internal/private sub-component, not directly exposed
5. Component instances (refs) → use design system component with overridden slots

============================================================
# 5. FORBIDDEN PATTERNS | 禁用模式
============================================================

1. NO hardcoded absolute x/y when Auto Layout (flex) is active
   - Exception: `layout: "none"` containers (e.g., 数字输入框)
2. NO direct Node ID references in generated code; use semantic names
3. NO raw hex colors in generated code; map to design tokens first:
   - #5e7ce0 → devui-brand / devui-primary
   - #252b3a → devui-text
   - #8a8e99 → devui-aide-text / devui-placeholder
   - #adb0b8 → devui-line / devui-form-control-line
   - #dfe1e6 → devui-dividing-line
   - #f2f5fc → devui-brand-foil / devui-list-item-active-bg
   - #50d4ab → devui-success
   - #f66f6a → devui-danger
   - #fac532 → devui-warning
   - #babbc0 → devui-disabled-text
   - #f5f5f5 → devui-disabled-bg / devui-global-bg
4. NO arbitrary border-radius values; use defined tokens (2/4/6/8/999)
5. NO font sizes outside the defined scale (12/14/15/16/18/20/24/28)
6. NO assuming "sm"/"md"/"lg" padding without checking .pen data
7. NO ignoring `enabled: false` nodes — they represent configurable options
8. NO using `margin` for spacing — use `gap` and `padding` only
9. NO skipping the shadow effect on cards and navigation — it's a core visual pattern

============================================================
# 6. VARIANT NAMING CONVENTION | 变体命名规范
============================================================

FORMAT: 组件类型/变体Key=Value[, 变体Key2=Value2, ...]

EXAMPLES:
  - 按钮-主要/尺寸-Size=md, 状态-Status=default
  - 复选框/选择状态-status=checked, 组件状态-componentStatus=hover
  - 搜索框-线框白底风格/搜索图标位置-iconPosition=left, 状态-Status=hover
  - .工具链专用导航-展开/状态-status=default, 展开=on, 二级菜单数量=3

NAMING_RULES:
  - "/" separates component type from variant properties
  - "," separates multiple variant axes
  - "=" separates key from value
  - Keys are bilingual: "尺寸-Size", "状态-Status", "颜色-Color"
  - "." prefix means internal/private sub-component
  - Status values: default, hover, active, disabled, focus, select
  - Size values: sm, md, lg

============================================================
# 7. LAYOUT PATTERNS | 布局模式
============================================================

## 7.1 Top Navigation Bar Pattern
- Full width (1920px)
- Height: ~40px (auto from padding)
- Left: logo + menu, Right: actions + avatar
- Shadow: soft bottom shadow
- `justify-content: space-between`

## 7.2 Sidebar Pattern (Accordion)
- Width: 288px (expanded) / 48px (collapsed)
- Height: fills viewport (904px in design)
- Contains expandable menu groups
- Active item: left blue border (2px #5e7ce0) + bold text + light blue bg

## 7.3 Card Grid Pattern
- Card width: 320px
- Card padding: 20px 24px
- Card gap: 16-20px
- Corner radius: 8px
- Shadow: subtle elevation

## 7.4 Form Layout Pattern
- Vertical stack of form items
- Label above input
- Optional: required asterisk, help icon, helper text below
- Input full-width within form column

## 7.5 Table Pattern
- Full-width container
- Header: optional gray background
- Body: alternating/plain rows
- Cells: text, checkbox, status, link, operation types
- Merged cells supported for complex layouts

============================================================
# END OF DOCUMENT
============================================================
